releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ci(release): support pre-release versions for BRAT testers by @josecoelho in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/112
* fix(tasks): strip nested tags from task title (#114) by @josecoelho in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/118
* chore(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory with 1 update by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/116
* feat(caldav): pin a calendar by URL (#113) by @josecoelho in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/119
* chore(deps-dev): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/121
* feat(sync): per-calendar sync direction (pull-only / push-only / both) by @josecoelho in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/120
* chore: release 1.4.0 by @josecoelho in https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/122


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: josecoelho
releases.description:
Pre-release for testing subtask sync — see [#61](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/issues/61) and [PR #100](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/pull/100).

## Install with BRAT

1. Install the [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) plugin in Obsidian if you don't already have it.
2. Open BRAT settings → **Add Beta plugin** → enter `josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav` and click **Add Plugin**. Enable BRAT's beta-channel option if prompted.
3. Enable **Tasks CalDAV Sync** in Settings → Community plugins.

BRAT auto-updates the plugin when new pre-releases are published.

## What's in

Indented checkbox tasks under a synced task now sync as nested CalDAV subtasks via `RELATED-TO;RELTYPE=PARENT`. Re-indenting or un-indenting in Obsidian propagates as a `RELATED-TO` update. Subtasks inherit sync eligibility from any synced ancestor — you don't have to tag every child.

See [docs/examples/subtasks.md](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/blob/worktree-61-subtasks/docs/examples/subtasks.md) for worked **before → after-sync** examples (basic nesting, re-parenting by indentation, body + subtasks, per-task completion, tag inheritance).

## Known limitations

- Vault-side deletion is still a pre-existing no-op (tracked in [#99](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/issues/99)). When a task is deleted on the CalDAV side, the ID mapping is cleaned up but the line is not removed from your vault.
- On first sync, each previously-bare child line gains both `🆔 <id>` and `#sync`. Self-stabilizing but the `#sync` materialization on every subtask is a known behaviour we may revisit.

Please report bugs or feedback on [#61](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/issues/61).
releases.name: 1.4.0-beta.1 — Subtask sync preview

releases.author: josecoelho
releases.description:
## Tasks CalDAV Sync v1.0.0

Bidirectional sync between obsidian-tasks and CalDAV servers.

### Features

- Bidirectional CalDAV sync with tag-based filtering
- Diff-based sync engine with three-way merge and delete detection
- Auto-sync with configurable interval
- Dry-run mode for sync preview
- Task notes round-trip as VTODO DESCRIPTION
- Recurrence (RRULE) round-trip
- Conflict detection with manual or auto-resolve modes

### Fixes

- Comply with Obsidian plugin submission guidelines (no console.log, use setHeading() API)
- Rename plugin ID to tasks-caldav-sync for community submission
- Resolve all ESLint violations from obsidian-releases review (type safety, sentence case, floating promises)
- Mark plugin as desktop only
- Add lint step to CI workflow

### Requirements

- Obsidian v0.15.0+
- [obsidian-tasks](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks) plugin

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/josecoelho/obsidian-tasks-caldav/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.
